ticket.title: MCP in-process dispatch — lift CLI to yah::cli::run(argv) lib API
next_steps: Define yah::cli::run(argv) -> Result<i32> in lib.rs (or cli.rs)
Move dispatch logic from main.rs::main into the lib function
Migrate yah/src/mcp/tools.rs from Command::new to in-process call
Wrap calls in std::panic::catch_unwind so a panic doesn't kill MCP
Use try_parse_from to avoid clap's process::exit on --help
Latency benchmark: tool-call sequence over 1k-file repo, expect ~10x speedup
verify: cargo build -p yah && cargo test -p yah
yah mcp smoke test: tool calls return identical results to subprocess impl
